text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home, I spot Symboli Rudolf heading
for the practice track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With things unusually quiet around the academy,
I could think of no better way to spend my free
time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, but there's no need to worry. I find the
exertion pleasantly bracing.
choice_data_list: Don't bite off more than you can chew.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha, I knew you would see things my way!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then we shall train for as long as time allows.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Together we'll strive for heights that none have
ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, the two of us end up training until
the track closes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Are you concerned I'll overexert myself?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All Umamusume have a responsibility to take
their trainer's words seriously.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I will consider training finished for
today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't do to fix my sights so high that I fall
flat on my face.
